entries.rights_posture: US Census public data; raw national GIS cache must stay out of git.
entries.expected_artifact: RPLAN county context with GEOID unit order, adjacency, and source hash references.
gate_notes: Boundary source only; time-zone assignments must cite DOT/49 CFR evidence separately.

entries.rights_posture: US Census public data; derived representative-point rows may be regenerated.
entries.expected_artifact: County representative-point table with GEOID, longitude, latitude, and source hash.
gate_notes: Internal points are exploratory and must be labeled before publication.

entries.rights_posture: US Census public data; source-derived county weights must record vintage.
entries.expected_artifact: County population table keyed by GEOID with source hash and vintage.
gate_notes: Population weights must not remain placeholders for the baseline scorecard.

entries.rights_posture: Federal regulation reference; cite retrieved eCFR text and clause paths.
entries.expected_artifact: Machine-readable current-law assignment evidence table citing 49 CFR Part 71 clauses.
gate_notes: County-level assignments must preserve clause evidence and uncertainty.

entries.rights_posture: DOT public map reference; verify metadata, vintage, and distribution terms before broad cache.
entries.expected_artifact: Reconciliation table comparing DOT geometry to county units and 49 CFR clauses.
gate_notes: Map geometry cannot override 49 CFR text without a documented reconciliation note.

entries.rights_posture: DOT public guidance; cite as process context, not score data.
entries.expected_artifact: Research note for boundary-change procedure and convenience-of-commerce context.
gate_notes: Procedure guidance must not be treated as a scoring dataset.

entries.rights_posture: IANA tzdb documentation reference; use for limitations and offset-rule context.
entries.expected_artifact: Research note explaining why IANA tzdb is not legal-boundary evidence.
gate_notes: Do not use as complete legal-boundary geometry for the US county baseline.
